title: Pan-Seared Syrian Chicken with Crunchy Tagine Sauce
description: A flavorful and spicy dish that combines the crunch of tagine with the rich flavors of Syrian spices.
instructions: Season the chicken breast with salt and black pepper.
Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Sear the chicken breast for 2-3 minutes on each side, or until browned.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 15-20 minutes, or until cooked through.
While the chicken is cooking, heat the crunchy tagine in a small saucepan over medium heat.
Add the syrian spice blend to the tagine and stir to combine.
Serve the chicken breast with the tagine sauce spooned over the top.
Optional: serve with casabe flatbread on the side.
